user_query: I just checked my spending and I'm way over budget. Replace all expensive dinners with a cheap eats placeholder and set cost to $10
reasoning: Replaced high-cost dinner restaurants with a budget 'Cheap Eats Placeholder' and set expected_cost to $10 for all identified expensive dinners.
